testbedPath.description: Path to the pyATS testbed YAML file. Defaults to OPENCLAW_PYATS_TESTBED env var or /root/.openclaw/testbed.yaml.

defaultDevice.description: Default device name in the testbed to target when no device is specified. Defaults to 'primary'.

timeoutSeconds.description: Default timeout in seconds for pyATS operations. Defaults to 60.
